name: warn-transformer

metadata.name: warn-transformer
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Consolidate, enrich and analyze the data gathered by warn-scraper

documentation:
## Links

- Documentation: [warn-transformer.readthedocs.io](https://warn-transformer.readthedocs.io)
- Repository: [github.com/biglocalnews/warn-transformer](https://github.com/biglocalnews/warn-transformer)
- Packaging: [pypi.org/project/warn-transformer](https://pypi.org/project/warn-transformer/)

## About

The project is sponsored by [Big Local News](https://biglocalnews.org/#/about), a program at Stanford University that collects data for impactful journalism. The code is maintained by [Ben Welsh](https://palewi.re/who-is-ben-welsh/), a visiting data journalist from the Los Angeles Times.

functions.name: warn_transformer.utils.get_all_transformers
documentation:
Get all the states and territories that have scrapers.

Returns: List of lower-case post abbreviations.

functions.name: warn_transformer.consolidate.run
documentation:
Consolidate raw data using a common data schema.

Args:
    input_dir (Path): The directory where our raw data files are stored.
    source (string): The slug of a source you'd like to transform as a one-off (optional)

Returns: The path to our consolidated comma-delimited file.

functions.name: warn_transformer.download.run
documentation:
Download all the CSVs in the WARN Notice project on biglocalnews.org.

Args:
    download_dir (Path): The directory where files will be downloaded.
    source (str): The postal code of the source to download. Default is all sources.

functions.name: warn_transformer.cli.cli
documentation: Consolidate, enrich and republish the data gathered by warn-scraper.

functions.name: warn_transformer.cli.download
documentation: Download all the CSVs in the WARN Notice project on biglocalnews.org.

functions.name: warn_transformer.cli.consolidate
documentation: Consolidate raw data using a common data schema.

functions.name: warn_transformer.cli.integrate
documentation: Integrate the latest consolidated data with the current database.

classes.name: warn_transformer.transformers.ut.Transformer
documentation: Transform Utah raw data for consolidation.

classes.name: warn_transformer.transformers.de.Transformer
documentation: Transform Deleware raw data for consolidation.

classes.name: warn_transformer.schema.WarnNoticeSchema
documentation: An standardized instance of a WARN Act Notice.

classes.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.__init__
documentation:
Intialize a new instance.

Args:
    input_dir (Path): A directory where our raw data is stored

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.get_raw_data
documentation:
Get the raw data from our scraper for this source.

Returns: A list of raw rows of data from the source.

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.transform
documentation:
Transform prepared rows into a form that's ready for consolidation.

Returns: A validated list of dictionaries that conform to our schema

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.prep_row_list
documentation:
Make necessary transformations to the raw row list prior to transformation.

Args:
    row_list (list): A list of raw rows of data from the source.

Returns: The row list minus empty records

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.transform_row
documentation:
Transform a row into a form that's ready for consolidation.

Args:
    row (dict): One raw row of data from the source

Returns: A transformed dict that's ready to be loaded into our consolidated schema.

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.get_raw_value
documentation:
Fetch a value from the row that for transformation.

Args:
    row: One raw row of data from the source
    method: The technique to use to pull data.
        If a strong method is provided,
        it is used to fetch a key of that name from the row. If a callable function is provided, the row is run through it.

Returns: A value ready for transformation.

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.get_hash_id
documentation:
Convert the row into a unique hexdigest to use as a unique identifier.

Args:
    data (dict): One raw row of data from the source

Returns: A unique hexdigest string computed from the source data.

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.transform_company
documentation:
Transform a raw company name.

Args:
    value (str): The raw company string provided by the source

Returns: A string object ready for consolidation.

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.transform_location
documentation:
Transform a raw location.

Args:
    value (str): The raw location string provided by the source

Returns: A string object ready for consolidation.

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.transform_date
documentation:
Transform a raw date string into a date object.

Args:
    value (str): The raw date string provided by the source

Returns: A date object ready for consolidation. Or, if the date string is invalid, a None.

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.transform_jobs
documentation:
Transform a raw jobs number into an integer.

Args:
    value (str): A raw jobs number provided by the source

Returns: An integer number ready for consolidation. Or, if the value is invalid, a None.

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.check_if_temporary
documentation:
Determine whether a row is a temporary or not.

Args:
    row (dict): The raw row of data.

Returns: A boolean or null

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.check_if_closure
documentation:
Determine whether a row is a closure or not.

Args:
    row (dict): The raw row of data.

Returns: A boolean or null

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.check_if_amendment
documentation:
Determine whether a row is an amendment or not.

Args:
    row (dict): The raw row of data.

Returns: A boolean

methods.name: warn_transformer.schema.BaseTransformer.handle_amendments
documentation:
Remove amended filings from the provided list of records.

Args:
    row_list (list): A list of clean rows of data.

Returns: A list of cleaned data, minus amended records.
Transform a state's raw data for consolidation.

functions.name: warn_transformer.integrate.run
documentation:
Integrate new consolidated data with the current database.

Args:
    new_path (Path): The path to the latest consolidated file on the local file system
    init_current_data (bool): Set to True when you want to create a new integrated dataset from scratch. Default False.

Returns a Path to the newly integrated file.

functions.name: warn_transformer.integrate.is_similar_string
documentation:
Evaluate whether we consider the two strings close enough to be likely variations.

Args:
    s1 (str): The first string.
    s2 (str): The second string.

Returns True or False.

functions.name: warn_transformer.integrate.is_similar_date
documentation:
Evaluate whether we consider the two date strings close enough to be likely variations.

Args:
    d1 (str): The first string.
    d2 (str): The second string.

Returns True or False.

functions.name: warn_transformer.integrate.get_likely_ancestor
documentation:
Determine if the provided new row has a likely parent in the current dataset.

Args:
    new_row (dict): A record from the new dataset believed to contain a change to the current dataset.
    current_data (list): All of the records in the current dataset for comparison

Returns:
    The record in the current data judged most likely to be the ancestor of the new record.
    Returns None if the record is estimated to be new.

functions.name: warn_transformer.integrate.get_current_data
documentation:
Fetch the most recent published version of our integrated dataset.

Args:
    init (bool): Set to True when you want to create a new integrated dataset from scratch. Default False.

Returns a list of dictionaries ready for comparison against the new consolidated data file.

functions.name: warn_transformer.integrate.get_changed_data
documentation:
Determine which rows in a new data file are different from the current dataset.

Args:
    new_data (dict): A dictionary keyed by postal code. Each value is a list of all records from that source.
    current_data (dict): A dictionary keyed by postal code. Each value is a list of all records from that source.

Returns a dictionary keyed by postal code. Each value is a list of all records with that value deemed to have changed.

functions.name: warn_transformer.integrate.regroup_by_source
documentation:
Regroup the provided list by its source field.

Args:
    data_list: A list of dictionaries presumed to have a "postal_code" field.

Returns: A dictionary keyed by postal code. Each value is a list of all records with that value.

functions.name: warn_transformer.integrate.flatten_grouped_data
documentation:
Flatten a dictionary of data grouped by source down to a single list.

Args:
    grouped_data (dict): The grouped data

Returns a list of the data for all sources
